title: KaralisB - Complete Edition
description: Adds both the Rimi and Maxima mod and datapack, so Its easier to play.
body:
The mod adds a Rimi structure and Maxima structure (2 popular stores from Latvia).
These structures contain new villagers with who you can trade with for food items, with relaistic prices from the actual stores (euro/kg - emerald/item). They also have storage rooms with pretty good items inside.
Adds an option to choose between 2 teams:
Team Rimi or team Maxima
Each team gets a card corresponding to their store, but cant interact with the other store.
For more info about the mod check out this tiktok:
[https://www.tiktok.com/@karalisb_/video/7468978887112903969?lang=en]
